title: elatine lindbergii
intro: Elatine lindbergii, also known as Lindberg's elatine, is a small aquatic plant species belonging to the family Elatinaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and wounds, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Elatine lindbergii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Elatine lindbergii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or dried extract for topical application and internal use.
